_global.text:
## Summary
Build a full-stack TypeScript meal-planner (React + Vite client, NestJS + Prisma/SQLite API, JWT auth) delivered as a single Docker image serving recipes, weekly planning, and an aggregated shopping list.

## Scope
Greenfield repo (only README + Colossus deploy workflow present). Monorepo: `/server` (NestJS API + static host) and `/client` (React SPA).

### Files to create

**Root / deploy**
- `Dockerfile` â€” multi-stage: build client (`vite build` â†’ `client/dist`), build server (`nest build`), final stage runs Node serving API + copies `client/dist` into `server/client-dist` for static hosting.
- `.dockerignore`, `package.json` (root workspace scripts), `.env.example` (`JWT_SECRET`, `DATABASE_URL`, `PORT`).
- `README.md` â€” update with run/deploy + demo credentials.

**Server (`/server`)**
- `package.json`, `tsconfig.json`, `nest-cli.json`
- `prisma/schema.prisma` â€” models below.
- `prisma/seed.ts` â€” seed demo `admin@recipebox.test` (ADMIN) + `cook@recipebox.test` (USER), password `password123`, plus a sample recipe.
- `src/main.ts` â€” bootstrap, global `ValidationPipe`, CORS, serve static `client-dist` with SPA fallback.
- `src/app.module.ts`
- `src/prisma/prisma.service.ts` + `prisma.module.ts`
- `src/health/health.controller.ts` â€” `GET /api/health`, `GET /api/health/deep` (DB ping). Public.
- `src/auth/` â€” `auth.module.ts`, `auth.service.ts`, `auth.controller.ts` (`POST /api/auth/signup`, `POST /api/auth/login`, `GET /api/auth/me`), `jwt.strategy.ts`, `jwt-auth.guard.ts`, `roles.guard.ts` + `@Roles()` decorator, `dto/`.
- `src/users/users.controller.ts` â€” `GET /api/users` (ADMIN only).
- `src/recipes/` â€” `recipes.module.ts`, `recipes.service.ts`, `recipes.controller.ts` (`GET /api/recipes?q=`, `POST`, `GET/:id`, `PUT/:id`, `DELETE/:id`), `dto/`.
- `src/plan/` â€” `plan.controller.ts` (`GET /api/plan?weekStart=`, `PUT /api/plan/entry`, `DELETE /api/plan/entry/:id`), `plan.service.ts`.
- `src/shopping/` â€” `shopping.controller.ts` (`GET /api/shopping-list?weekStart=`, `PUT /api/shopping-list/check`), `shopping.service.ts` (aggregation + merge logic).

**Client (`/client`)**
- `package.json`, `vite.config.ts` (dev proxy `/api` â†’ server), `tsconfig.json`, `index.html`, `src/main.tsx`, `src/App.tsx` (router).
- `src/api/client.ts` â€” fetch wrapper injecting JWT from localStorage.
- `src/auth/AuthContext.tsx`, `src/auth/RequireAuth.tsx` (route guard), `src/auth/RequireAdmin.tsx`.
- Pages: `LoginPage.tsx`, `SignupPage.tsx`, `RecipeListPage.tsx`, `RecipeDetailPage.tsx`, `RecipeEditPage.tsx` (new+edit), `PlanPage.tsx`, `ShoppingListPage.tsx`, `AdminUsersPage.tsx`, `NotFound.tsx`.
- Components: `NavBar.tsx` (logout), `RecipeForm.tsx`, `IngredientRow.tsx`, `AssignMealModal.tsx`.
- `src/lib/week.ts` â€” Monday-anchored `weekStart` helper.

### Dependencies
- Server: `@nestjs/*`, `@nestjs/jwt`, `@nestjs/passport`, `passport-jwt`, `prisma`/`@prisma/client`, `bcrypt`, `class-validator`, `class-transformer`. DB: SQLite (self-contained, single image).
- Client: `react`, `react-dom`, `react-router-dom`, `@tanstack/react-query`, `vite`, `typescript`.

### Assumptions
- **Stack chosen** (greenfield): NestJS + Prisma/SQLite + JWT; React + Vite + React Router. JWT (not sessions) since API + SPA. Single Docker image: NestJS serves the built SPA and `/api`.
- **Auth model = `full_auth`**: login, signup, logout, guards on all app routes; public exempt = `/login`, `/signup`, `/api/health`, `/api/health/deep`. First signup becomes ADMIN; demo USER + ADMIN also seeded (reconciles "seeded credentials").
- **Week** = the current Monday-anchored week (`weekStart` = ISO date). Only current week is planned; week navigation out of scope.
- **Ingredient merge key** = normalized (lowercased/trimmed) `name` + `unit`; matching entries sum quantities, differing units stay separate.
- **Check-off state** persisted per `(userId, weekStart, itemKey)` in a separate table so it survives reloads and list regeneration.
- Tags stored as JSON string array on Recipe; steps stored as ordered `Step` rows.

### Data model (`schema.prisma`)
- `User { id, email @unique, passwordHash, role (USER|ADMIN default USER), createdAt }`
- `Recipe { id, userId, title, servings Int, tags String(json), createdAt, ingredients[], steps[] }`
- `Ingredient { id, recipeId, name, quantity Float, unit, position }`
- `Step { id, recipeId, position, text }`
- `PlanEntry { id, userId, weekStart, dayIndex 0-6, slot (BREAKFAST|LUNCH|DINNER), recipeId, @@unique([userId,weekStart,dayIndex,slot]) }`
- `ShoppingCheck { id, userId, weekStart, itemKey, checked Bool, @@unique([userId,weekStart,itemKey]) }`

### Routes (all deep-linkable â€” required for verification)
- `/login`, `/signup` (public)
- `/` â†’ redirect `/recipes`
- `/recipes` (guarded) â€” collection; search via `?q=pasta`
- `/recipes/new` (guarded) â€” create form
- `/recipes/:id` (guarded) â€” detail (all ingredients + steps)
- `/recipes/:id/edit` (guarded)
- `/plan` (guarded) â€” week grid; assign dialog as `?modal=assign&day=<0-6>&slot=<slot>`
- `/shopping-list` (guarded)
- `/admin/users` (guarded + ADMIN)
- `*` â†’ NotFound

## Implementation Plan

### Step 1: Scaffold monorepo + tooling
**Files:** root `package.json`, `/server`, `/client` scaffolds, `.env.example`.
**Change:** Create workspace with scripts `dev`, `build`, `start`, `db:migrate`, `db:seed`. Initialize NestJS and Vite-React-TS apps.

### Step 2: Prisma schema, migration, seed
**File:** `prisma/schema.prisma`, `prisma/seed.ts`.
**Change:** Define models above; run initial migration; seed ADMIN + USER (bcrypt-hashed) and one sample recipe ("Lemon Pasta", 5 ingredients/4 steps) for the demo cook.

### Step 3: Auth module
**Files:** `src/auth/*`.
**Change:** Signup (bcrypt hash; first-ever user â†’ ADMIN), login (issue JWT with `sub`, `role`), `me`. JWT strategy + `JwtAuthGuard` applied globally except `@Public()`-marked health/auth routes. `RolesGuard` for admin endpoints.

### Step 4: Recipes API
**File:** `src/recipes/*`.
**Change:** CRUD scoped to `req.user.id`. `GET /api/recipes?q=` filters by title OR tag containing `q` (case-insensitive). Nested create/update of ingredients + steps in a transaction; return recipe with relations ordered by `position`.

### Step 5: Plan API
**File:** `src/plan/*`.
**Change:** `GET /api/plan?weekStart=` returns entries + joined recipe titles for the week. `PUT /api/plan/entry` upserts on unique `(userId,weekStart,dayIndex,slot)`. `DELETE` clears a slot.

### Step 6: Shopping-list API
**File:** `src/shopping/*`.
**Change:** Load week's plan entries â†’ their recipes' ingredients â†’ merge by `itemKey = lower(name)+"|"+lower(unit)`, sum quantities, sort alphabetically by name. Join `ShoppingCheck` to attach `checked`. `PUT /api/shopping-list/check` upserts `{itemKey, checked}` for the week.

### Step 7: Static hosting + health
**Files:** `src/main.ts`, `src/health/*`.
**Change:** Serve `client-dist` with SPA fallback to `index.html` for non-`/api` routes; keep `/api/health` + `/api/health/deep` public.

### Step 8: Client auth + routing shell
**Files:** `App.tsx`, `AuthContext.tsx`, `RequireAuth.tsx`, `RequireAdmin.tsx`, `NavBar.tsx`.
**Change:** React Router with guards redirecting unauthenticated users to `/login`; store JWT in localStorage; `AuthContext` loads `me` on boot; logout clears token.

### Step 9: Recipe pages
**Files:** `RecipeListPage.tsx`, `RecipeDetailPage.tsx`, `RecipeEditPage.tsx`, `RecipeForm.tsx`, `IngredientRow.tsx`.
**Change:** List bound to `?q=` search box; detail renders all ingredients + steps; form supports dynamic ingredient/step rows for create + edit.

### Step 10: Plan page
**Files:** `PlanPage.tsx`, `AssignMealModal.tsx`.
**Change:** 7-day Ă— 3-slot grid for current `weekStart`; clicking an empty slot opens `?modal=assign&day=&slot=` recipe picker; assignment persists via API and restores on reload.

### Step 11: Shopping-list page
**File:** `ShoppingListPage.tsx`.
**Change:** Render merged/alphabetical items with checkboxes; checked items struck-through; toggling calls check API; state restored from server on load.

### Step 12: Admin users page
**File:** `AdminUsersPage.tsx`.
**Change:** ADMIN-guarded table of all users (email, role, createdAt) from `GET /api/users`.

### Step 13: Dockerfile + deploy wiring
**File:** `Dockerfile`, `.dockerignore`.
**Change:** Multi-stage build; final image runs migrations + seed on start, then Nest server on `$PORT`. Confirm Colossus workflow deploys this image.

## Testing Strategy
- **Auth:** seeded USER logs in â†’ lands on `/recipes`; signup of first user â†’ ADMIN; guarded route while logged out â†’ redirect `/login`; non-admin hitting `/admin/users` â†’ blocked.
- **Recipes:** create "Lemon Pasta" (5 ingredients/4 steps) â†’ appears in list, detail shows all; search `pasta` â†’ only title/tag matches returned.
- **Plan:** assign Lemon Pasta to Wed dinner â†’ shows in slot, persists after reload (verify via `GET /api/plan`).
- **Shopping list:** 3 meals planned â†’ each ingredient once with summed quantities, alphabetical; merge verified for shared name+unit; check "lemons" â†’ struck-through and still checked after reload.
- **Health:** `/api/health` 200; `/api/health/deep` returns DB-ok.
- **Deploy:** Docker image builds; SPA deep links (e.g. `/recipes/:id`) resolve via fallback.

## Risks
- **SQLite persistence** depends on a mounted volume in the deploy target; ephemeral container storage would reset data â€” confirm Colossus volume, or switch `DATABASE_URL` to Postgres (schema is provider-portable).
- **Startup seed** must be idempotent (upsert by email) to avoid duplicate-seed failures on restart.
- **Quantity units** are free-text; only exact unit matches merge â€” acceptable per spec, but non-normalized units (e.g. "tbsp" vs "tablespoon") won't combine.
- **JWT_SECRET** must be provided in the deploy env; fail fast if missing.
